{"step_by_step_thinking": "The documents provide information on various measures of disease burden, but the Disability Adjusted Life Years (DALYs) is consistently mentioned in relation to quantifying the overall burden of diseases. DALYs account for both the years of life lost due to premature mortality (YLLs) and the years lived with disabilities (YLDs). This comprehensive approach makes DALYs the best index for burden of disease among the given options.", "answer_choice": "D"}
